highRiskComments.author: BrightAd306
highRiskComments.body:
His wife also has no job skills. And he probably wont even serve a long sentence. If she divorces him, she will be impoverished. Even if she doesnt, who will hire him now? He just destroyed her life. She and Anna both did what they were told and didnt get an education or job skills and were submissive little wives. Kendras parents dont have money. Anna at least has her husband in prison for 10 years so Jim Bob will support her if she doesnt divorce him. Joe will be out in 2.

Clearly the direct victim has it worse, but holy hell this is so awful.
